sourceMessages.subject: Q3 Planning Meeting – Thursday 10am
sourceMessages.body:
Hi all,

Please join us for a Q3 planning meeting on Thursday 26 June 2026 at 10:00 AM (UTC).
The meeting will run until approximately 11:30 AM.

Location: Conference Room B / Zoom link in calendar invite.

Agenda items:
- Roadmap review
- Resource allocation
- Risk register update

See you there!
Alice

sourceMessages.subject: Interview Confirmation – Software Engineer Role
sourceMessages.body:
Dear Candidate,

This is a confirmation of your interview for the Software Engineer role.

Date: 25 June 2026
Time: 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM (UTC)
Format: Video call (link will be shared separately)

Please confirm your availability by replying to this email.

Best regards,
HR Team

sourceMessages.subject: Cancelled: Weekly Standup – 20 June
sourceMessages.body:
Hi team,

The weekly standup scheduled for 20 June 2026 at 9:00 AM has been cancelled due to a public holiday.

We will resume the regular standup on 27 June.

Thanks,
Ops

sourceMessages.subject: Proposed: Product Demo – Tentative Date 24 June
sourceMessages.body:
Team,

We are tentatively scheduling the product demo for 24 June 2026 at 3:30 PM (UTC).
This is a proposed time pending confirmation from the leadership team.

Venue: Main boardroom or remote via conference bridge.
Duration: 60 minutes.

Please flag any conflicts before end of day 19 June.

Regards,
Product Team

sourceMessages.subject: Mandatory Security Awareness Workshop – 30 June 2026
sourceMessages.body:
All staff,

A mandatory security awareness workshop will be held on 30 June 2026.
Time: 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM (UTC)
Location: Training Room 1

Attendance is required for all employees. Please add this to your calendar.
An ICS file is attached to this message.

Security Team

sourceMessages.subject: Quick sync later?
sourceMessages.body:
Hey Bob,

Got 15 minutes for a quick sync call today around 4 PM?
No agenda, just a catch-up on the onboarding work.

Alice

expectedEvents.description: Video call interview for the Software Engineer role.

reviewNotes: All source messages use synthetic example.test addresses only.
ICS attachment presence is indicated via hasIcsAttachment flag; no real binary attachments are included.
Event titles, dates, and descriptions are fictional and do not correspond to any real calendar data.
Live mailbox ingestion, real calendar API writes, and notification delivery remain out of scope for this isolated tool.
